title: Strong Subadditivity: The Fundamental Inequality
description: Master strong subadditivity - the most important inequality in quantum information theory with profound implications for entanglement and holography.
learningObjectives: State and understand strong subadditivity and its equivalent forms
Prove key consequences of strong subadditivity
Apply SSA to derive other entropic inequalities
Connect SSA to quantum Markov chains
Explore applications in holography and many-body physics
